faqs.question: How much does cricket control cost in White Plains?
faqs.answer: Cricket control services in White Plains typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and whether you need residential or commercial treatment. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What types of crickets are common in White Plains?
faqs.answer: White Plains homes primarily deal with house crickets, field crickets, and camel crickets (cave crickets). House crickets are attracted to warm indoor spaces, while camel crickets prefer damp basements and crawl spaces common in older White Plains properties. Field crickets often enter buildings in fall seeking warmth.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a cricket infestation in White Plains?
faqs.answer: Most cricket infestations in White Plains can be significantly reduced within 24-48 hours of initial treatment, with complete elimination typically achieved within 1-2 weeks. Treatment time varies based on infestation severity and property size. We offer same-day and next-day service for urgent cricket problems.

faqs.question: Are your cricket control treatments safe for White Plains apartments and condos?
faqs.answer: Yes, our cricket control methods are completely safe for apartments, condos, and multi-family buildings throughout White Plains. We use family-friendly and pet-safe products that are EPA-approved and specifically designed for indoor residential use. Our technicians follow strict protocols to ensure the safety of all residents.
